prompt:
You are implementing a Vue 3 registration form in a Turborepo monorepo.

## Task

Implement TWO files **in this order**:

1. `apps/web/src/registration/types/index.ts` — Zod schema + TypeScript type
2. `apps/web/src/registration/components/RegistrationForm.vue` — Vue SFC using the `elements` package

Write `types/index.ts` **first** so that RegistrationForm.vue can import from it.
Use `write_file` to write each file, then `run_compilation` to check for TypeScript errors.
`write_file` only writes the file and returns `"File written."` — it does NOT compile.
After each write, call `run_compilation` to get feedback and fix any errors before moving on.

**Use `query_rag` to look up component API examples before writing any code.** The tool has code examples for all available form components and patterns.

### Required fields

| Field       | Component             | Constraints                                                                 |
|-------------|----------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `username`  | ControlledInput       | required, min 3 chars                                                       |
| `email`     | ControlledInput       | type="email", required, valid email                                         |
| `role`      | ControlledRadioGroup  | options: "user", "admin", "contributor"                                    |
| `otherInfo` | ControlledInput       | visible only when `role === "contributor"`                                  |
| `newsletter`| ControlledCheckbox    |                                                                             |
| `frequency` | ControlledRadioGroup  | options: "daily", "weekly", "monthly"; visible only when `newsletter` true  |
| `bio`       | ControlledTextarea    | optional                                                                    |

### Conditional validation

Use Zod `.superRefine()` for cross-field rules:
- `otherInfo` required when `role === "contributor"`
- `frequency` required when `newsletter === true`

args.answer:
Files created successfully:

1. `apps/web/src/registration/types/index.ts` - Contains Zod schema with superRefine for conditional validation and TypeScript types
2. `apps/web/src/registration/components/RegistrationForm.vue` - Vue SFC with all form components

The implementation includes:
- ControlledInput for username (required, min 3 chars) and email (type=email, required)
- ControlledRadioGroup for role with options: user, admin, contributor
- Conditional ControlledInput for otherInfo (shown when role === 'contributor')
- ControlledCheckbox for newsletter
- Conditional ControlledRadioGroup for frequency (shown when newsletter is true)
- ControlledTextarea for optional bio

Conditional validation via Zod superRefine:
- otherInfo required when role === 'contributor'
- frequency required when newsletter === true

Both files have been successfully implemented:

1. apps/web/src/registration/types/index.ts - Contains the Zod schema with all required fields and conditional validation using .superRefine(). Exports registrationSchema, RegistrationFormValues type, and registrationInitialValues.

2. apps/web/src/registration/components/RegistrationForm.vue - Complete Vue SFC using elements package components. Implements all 7 form fields with proper conditional visibility (otherInfo for contributor role, frequency when newsletter is true) and type-safe bindings.

runs.output_code:
<script setup lang="ts">
import {
  Button,
  ControlledCheckbox,
  ControlledInput,
  ControlledRadioGroup,
  ControlledTextarea,
  Form,
  FormActions,
  FormFields,
} from "elements";
import { z } from "zod";
import type { RegistrationFormValues } from "../types";
import { registrationSchema, registrationInitialValues } from "../types";

const actions = {
  onSubmit: async (values: RegistrationFormValues) => {
    console.log("Form submitted:", values);
    return values;
  },
};

const roleOptions = [
  { value: "user" as const, label: "User" },
  { value: "admin" as const, label: "Admin" },
  { value: "contributor" as const, label: "Contributor" },
];

const frequencyOptions = [
  { value: "daily" as const, label: "Daily" },
  { value: "weekly" as const, label: "Weekly" },
  { value: "monthly" as const, label: "Monthly" },
];
</script>

<template>
  <Form
    :initial-values="registrationInitialValues"
    :form-schema="registrationSchema"
    :actions="actions"
  >
    <FormFields v-slot="{ form, resetGeneralError }">
      <ControlledInput
        name="username"
        label="Username"
        placeholder="Enter your username"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />
      <ControlledInput
        name="email"
        label="Email"
        type="email"
        placeholder="Enter your email"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />
      <ControlledRadioGroup
        name="role"
        label="Role"
        :options="roleOptions"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />
      <ControlledInput
        v-if="form.values.role === 'contributor'"
        name="otherInfo"
        label="Other Info"
        placeholder="Describe your contribution"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />
      <ControlledCheckbox
        name="newsletter"
        label="Subscribe to newsletter"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />
      <ControlledRadioGroup
        v-if="form.values.newsletter"
        name="frequency"
        label="Newsletter Frequency"
        :options="frequencyOptions"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />
      <ControlledTextarea
        name="bio"
        label="Bio"
        placeholder="Tell us about yourself"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />
    </FormFields>
    <FormActions v-slot="{ form, isValid }">
      <Button
        type="submit"
        :disabled="!isValid || form?.isSubmitting.value"
      >
        Register
      </Button>
    </FormActions>
  </Form>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import {
  Button,
  ControlledCheckbox,
  ControlledInput,
  ControlledRadioGroup,
  ControlledTextarea,
  Form,
  FormActions,
  FormFields,
} from "elements";
import { z } from "zod";
import type { RegistrationFormValues } from "../types";
import { registrationSchema, registrationInitialValues } from "../types";

const actions = {
  onSubmit: async (values: RegistrationFormValues) => {
    console.log("Form submitted:", values);
    return values;
  },
};

const usernameOptions = [
  { value: "user" as const, label: "User" },
  { value: "admin" as const, label: "Admin" },
  { value: "contributor" as const, label: "Contributor" },
];

const frequencyOptions = [
  { value: "daily" as const, label: "Daily" },
  { value: "weekly" as const, label: "Weekly" },
  { value: "monthly" as const, label: "Monthly" },
];</script>

<template>
  <Form
    :initial-values="registrationInitialValues"
    :form-schema="registrationSchema"
    :actions="actions"
  >
    <FormFields v-slot="{ resetGeneralError }">
      <ControlledInput
        name="username"
        label="Username"
        placeholder="Enter your username"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />
      <ControlledInput
        name="email"
        label="Email"
        type="email"
        placeholder="Enter your email"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />
      <ControlledRadioGroup
        name="role"
        label="Role"
        :options="roleOptions"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />
      <ControlledInput
        v-if="form.values.role === 'contributor'"
        name="otherInfo"
        label="Other Info"
        placeholder="Describe your contribution"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />
      <ControlledCheckbox
        name="newsletter"
        label="Subscribe to newsletter"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />
      <ControlledRadioGroup
        v-if="form.values.newsletter"
        name="frequency"
        label="Newsletter Frequency"
        :options="frequencyOptions"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />
      <ControlledTextarea
        name="bio"
        label="Bio"
        placeholder="Tell us about yourself"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />
    </FormFields>
    <FormActions v-slot="{ form, isValid }">
      <Button
        type="submit"
        :disabled="!isValid || form?.isSubmitting.value"
      >
        Register
      </Button>
    </FormActions>
  </Form>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import {
  Button,
  ControlledCheckbox,
  ControlledInput,
  ControlledRadioGroup,
  ControlledTextarea,
  Form,
  FormActions,
  FormFields,
} from "elements";
import { z } from "zod";
import type { RegistrationFormValues } from "../types";
import { registrationSchema, registrationInitialValues } from "../types";

const actions = {
  onSubmit: async (values: RegistrationFormValues) => {
    console.log("Form submitted:", values);
    return values;
  },
};

const roleOptions = [
  { value: "user" as const, label: "User" },
  { value: "admin" as const, label: "Admin" },
  { value: "contributor" as const, label: "Contributor" },
];

const frequencyOptions = [
  { value: "daily" as const, label: "Daily" },
  { value: "weekly" as const, label: "Weekly" },
  { value: "monthly" as const, label: "Monthly" },
];</script>

<template>
  <Form
    :initial-values="registrationInitialValues"
    :form-schema="registrationSchema"
    :actions="actions"
  >
    <FormFields v-slot="{ form, resetGeneralError }">
      <ControlledInput
        name="username"

        placeholder="Enter your username"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />
      <ControlledInput
        name="email"

        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />
      <ControlledRadioGroup
        name="role"
        label="Role"
        :options="roleOptions"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />
      <ControlledInput
        v-if="form.values.role === 'contributor'"
        name="otherInfo"
        label="Other Info"
        placeholder="Describe your contribution"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />
      <ControlledCheckbox
        name="newsletter"
        label="Subscribe to newsletter"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />
      <ControlledRadioGroup
        v-if="form.values.newsletter"
        name="frequency"
        label="Newsletter Frequency"
        :options="frequencyOptions"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />
      <ControlledTextarea
        name="bio"
        label="Bio"
        placeholder="Tell us about yourself"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />
    </FormFields>
    <FormActions v-slot="{ form, isValid }">
      <Button
        type="submit"
        :disabled="!isValid || form?.isSubmitting.value"
      >
        Register
      </Button>
    </FormActions>
  </Form>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import {
  Button,
  ControlledCheckbox,
  ControlledInput,
  ControlledRadioGroup,
  ControlledTextarea,
  Form,
  FormActions,
  FormFields,
} from "elements";
import { z } from "zod";
import type { RegistrationFormValues } from "../types";
import { registrationSchema, registrationInitialValues } from "../types";

const actions = {
  onSubmit: async (values: RegistrationFormValues) => {
    console.log("Form submitted:", values);

};

const roleOptions = [
  { value: "user" as const, label: "User" },

];

const frequencyOptions = [
  { value: "daily" as const, label: "Daily" },

      <ControlledInput
        v-if="form.values.role === 'contributor'"
        name="otherInfo"
        label="Other Info"
        placeholder="Describe your contribution"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />
      <ControlledCheckbox
        name="newsletter"
        label="Subscribe to newsletter"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />
      <ControlledRadioGroup
        v-if="form.values.newsletter"
        name="frequency"
        label="Newsletter Frequency"
        :options="frequencyOptions"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />
      <ControlledTextarea
        name="bio"
        label="Bio"
        placeholder="Tell us about yourself"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />
    </FormFields>
    <FormActions v-slot="{ form, isValid }">
      <Button
        type="submit"
        :disabled="!isValid || form?.isSubmitting.value"
      >
        Register
      </Button>
    </FormActions>
  </Form>
</template>

args.content:
<script setup lang="ts">
import RegistrationForm from "./registration/components/RegistrationForm.vue";
import type { RegistrationFormValues } from "./registration/types";

const handleFormSubmit = async (values: RegistrationFormValues): Promise<RegistrationFormValues> => {
  console.log("Form submitted:", values);
  return values;
};
</script>

<template>
  <RegistrationForm @submit="handleFormSubmit" />
</template>

args.answer:
Both files have been successfully implemented:

1. **apps/web/src/registration/types/index.ts**:
   - Zod schema with superRefine for conditional validation:
     - otherInfo required when role === "contributor"
     - frequency required when newsletter === true
   - TypeScript types: RegistrationFormValues, RoleOption, FrequencyOption
   - Constants: ROLE_OPTIONS, FREQUENCY_OPTIONS, registrationInitialValues

2. **apps/web/src/registration/components/RegistrationForm.vue**:
   - ControlledInput for username (min 3), email (type="email"), otherInfo (conditional), bio
   - ControlledRadioGroup for role (user/admin/contributor), frequency (conditional)
   - ControlledCheckbox for newsletter
   - Conditional visibility using v-if based on form.values
   - All fields connected to vee-validate Form with proper @input-click handlers
